items.caption: Cover of Eyeopener's Annual Red Pepper, Fourth Edition, featuring an illustration of "The Original Bali Dancer" on a beach. A text box on the left lists "HUMOR with the lid off! Cartoons, Poems, Annette's PEPPER-UPPERS, FRENCH ART". The price is listed as 50¢.
